args: Write-Host 'Activating virtual environment...' -ForegroundColor Cyan; & .venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1; Write-Host 'Pinning build dependencies (numpy/opencv)...' -ForegroundColor Cyan; pip install "numpy<2,>=1.24" "opencv-python==4.7.0.72"; Write-Host 'Building TMO executable...' -ForegroundColor Cyan; pyinstaller TMO.spec; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Host 'Build successful! Creating distribution package...' -ForegroundColor Green; if (Test-Path 'TMO_Distribution') { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'TMO_Distribution' }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'TMO_Distribution' | Out-Null; Copy-Item 'dist\TMO.exe' -Destination 'TMO_Distribution\'; Copy-Item -Recurse 'chrome_extension' -Destination 'TMO_Distribution\chrome_extension'; Copy-Item 'INSTALL.txt' -Destination 'TMO_Distribution\'; Copy-Item 'README.md' -Destination 'TMO_Distribution\'; Write-Host 'Package created in TMO_Distribution folder!' -ForegroundColor Green; Write-Host 'Contents:' -ForegroundColor Yellow; Get-ChildItem 'TMO_Distribution' | Format-Table Name } else { Write-Host 'Build failed!' -ForegroundColor Red }

Write-Host 'Cleaning build artifacts...' -ForegroundColor Yellow; if (Test-Path 'build') { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'build'; Write-Host 'Removed build/' -ForegroundColor Green }; if (Test-Path 'dist') { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'dist'; Write-Host 'Removed dist/' -ForegroundColor Green }; if (Test-Path 'TMO_Distribution') { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'TMO_Distribution'; Write-Host 'Removed TMO_Distribution/' -ForegroundColor Green }; Write-Host 'Clean complete!' -ForegroundColor Green
